headline: Amazon opens up its logistics network to other businesses
summary: Amazon.com said on Monday it was rolling out "Amazon ‚ÄåSupply Chain Services", opening up its ‚Äålogistics network for other businesses to use.  Businesses ‚Äãof all types and sizes can now move, store and deliver everything from raw materials to final products using ‚Äåthe full breadth ‚ÅÝof Amazon's own supply-chain network, including freight, distribution and fulfillment, ‚ÅÝand parcel shipping, the company said.  The announcement hit shares of logistics companies, ‚Äãwith UPS ‚Äãand FedEx ‚Äãslipping 1.5% and ‚Äå2.5%, respectively, in premarket trading.
